summary: Made two surgical continuity edits: anchored Chapter 12's opening to Chapter 11's final clinic reminder, and tightened the final beat to hand off directly into Chapter 13's first-rest-day morning. No style-bible example_lines key was present, so no calibration-line replacements were required.
edits: Rewrote opening sentence to reference the reminder set before sleep and smooth the Chapter 11 -> Chapter 12 handoff.
Adjusted final sentence to emphasize the overnight hold on Saturday boundaries and bridge into Chapter 13's morning rest-day opening.
Confirmed no `example_lines` entries exist in `outline/style_bible.json`, so no verbatim calibration lines required replacement.
